codex_access_token.description: OAuth access token for the ChatGPT/Codex backend. Set by `modulus auth modulus-codex`; refreshed automatically at runtime.

codex_refresh_token.description: OAuth refresh token used to mint new access tokens. Set by `modulus auth modulus-codex`.

codex_id_token.description: OAuth id_token (JWT). Kept so the ChatGPT account id can be re-derived after a refresh.

codex_expires_at.description: Epoch milliseconds at which the access token expires. Managed automatically.

codex_account_id.description: ChatGPT account id sent as the chatgpt-account-id header. Derived from the id_token during auth.

model.description: Codex model to route handoffs to.

base_url.description: Codex backend base URL. Handoffs POST to `<base_url>/responses`. Change only if OpenAI moves the endpoint.

daily_call_ceiling.description: Maximum Codex calls allowed per local day. Once hit, handoffs are refused until midnight. Hard cap on spend.

max_output_tokens.description: Upper bound on Codex completion length per call.

context_turns.description: How many recent conversation turns to attach to each handoff so Codex has context it can't otherwise see. 0 disables (Codex sees only the task). Higher = better continuity but more tokens and more chat sent to OpenAI.

context_max_chars.description: Upper bound on the characters of recent-conversation context attached to a handoff. Oldest turns are dropped to fit.

request_timeout_ms.description: How long to wait for a single Codex response before giving up (ms). Codex tasks can be slow.

time_zone.description: IANA timezone used to bucket the daily call ceiling (e.g. America/New_York). Defaults to system timezone.
